    S

    session - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.GameController
    Manages game session state including points, level, and win condition.
    setData(int, String, int, boolean) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.FinalController
    Populates the final screen with the game result data.
    start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.Main
    Starts the JavaFX application by creating the main game window.
    startTimer(int) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.GameTimer
    Starts the countdown timer from the given initial time.
    startTimer(int) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.IGameTimer
    Starts the countdown timer from the specified initial time.
    stopTimer() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.GameTimer
    Stops the countdown timer if it is currently running.
    stopTimer() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.IGameTimer
    Stops the countdown timer if it is currently running.
